name: DW · Dim Channel
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS channel_id,
    (ARRAY['Paid Search','Organic Search','Email','Social Paid','Social Organic',
           'Display','Affiliate','Referral','Direct','Video','Podcast','Print'])[gs] AS channel_name,
    (ARRAY['Acquisition','Acquisition','Retention','Acquisition','Awareness',
           'Awareness','Acquisition','Retention','Direct','Awareness','Awareness','Awareness'])[gs] AS channel_group,
    (ARRAY['Digital','Digital','Digital','Digital','Digital',
           'Digital','Digital','Digital','Digital','Digital','Audio','Offline'])[gs] AS medium
FROM generate_series(1, 12) AS gs
